div.h2: Position Drift Detection: Off-by-One Accumulates Over 50 Lines

div.p: Δ error at line 50 = +50 columns Started with: off-by-1 per line (e.g. column += 2 on \n, or tab = 2 col-units) After 1 line → off by 1 After 5 lines → off by 5 After 25 lines → off by 25 After 50 lines → off by 50 What should be column=1 reports column=51

g.text: WHY SINGLE-TOKEN TESTS NEVER CATCH DRIFT
COMMON ROOT CAUSES OF COLUMN DRIFT
THE FIX: advance() is the SOLE updater of line and column
line_50_tokens = [t for t in tokens if t.line == 50]
assert first.column == 1 # FAILS if drift: reports 51

div.p: Single-line test (BLIND) python tokens = Scanner('+').scan_tokens() assert tokens[0].column == 1 # ✓
Off-by-one per line never triggers because there is only 1 line. Drift = 0 × 1 = 0 — test passes!

div.h1: After 50 lines with +1 drift per line:

text.tspan: # Rule: NEVER do self.current += 1 outside advance()
# Rule: NEVER do self.current += 1 outside advance()
